title: Fanvue Spicy Caption Generator Prompt
promptText: Write perfect captions for the images of my AI Influencer I post on Fanvue. The images are mostly very spicy and I want the captions to be suitable to for an exklusive content platform. I want the captions to be a mix between playful, sensual and also funny or provocative. sometimes always end with an engaging. question to my audience. i will tell you which style I wish the caption should not be longer than three sentences.
